description: When fighting together, applies Ground damage to the player's attacks. Sometimes dodges attacks with a high speed sidestep while in battle.
Can be ridden. Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage dealt to ore while mounted.
Can be ridden. Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.
Can be ridden to travel on water. Applies Water damage to the player's attacks while mounted.
Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with an Ice-forged hammer.
Can be ridden as a flying mount. Applies Electric damage to the player's attacks while mounted.
Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch. While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.
Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.
Can be ridden. While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.
Can be ridden. While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.
While in team, increases attack power of Grass Pals.
Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry Aqua helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful slash.
Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch.
Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch.
While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 50-200. (Does not stack)
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Phantom Peck.
While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Allows you to move quickly for long periods of time while gliding with this Pal.
While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
Can be ridden. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.
Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.
Can be ridden. Applies Dragon damage to the player's attacks while mounted.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Poison Fog.
While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
While in team, increases attack power of Neutral Pals by 15-30%. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

When activated, channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by 50-86%.

When activated, channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in team, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25-40%.
While fighting together, Dragon Pals drop more items when defeated.
While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.
While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.
Can be ridden. Runs faster over sand.
While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.
While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.
When activated, chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100-900%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.
When activated, performs Shell Spin, follows the player while spinning, and mines ores efficiently.
Can be ridden. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.
Can be ridden. Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.
Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.
When activated, moves to the closest base. Cannot be used within dungeons, etc.

Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch. While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.1-0.5% per second outside of combat.

While in team, increases attack power of Ice Pals.
When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.
When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

When activated, its muscles swell, increasing attack power and defense.
